structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-02-14 BAML 2nd Home Program
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-02-14 15:59:01-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Capital Markets is pleased to announce the addition of BAML’s 2nd Home Program.  This is a delegated option; all underwriting is done by NOVA and follows Agency requirements with the same guidelines and overlays as the NOVA Advantage Non-Owner program in addition to significantly reduced loan level price adjustments.

 

Program Highlights

*	80% max LTV
*	680 FICO
*	Eligible Property Types

	*	SFRs and PUDs (Attached and Detached)
	*	Condos
	*	2–4-unit properties

*	45% Max DTI
*	30-Year Fixed
*	Loan Amount

	*	Minimum $150,000
	*	Max lesser of Agency maximum & 1MM

*	Loans must be run through Automated Underwriting System (“AUS”), no manually underwritten loans will be accepted

	*	Only DU or LP are acceptable

*	Full Appraisals required

	*	Appraisal Waivers are ineligible

 

 

 

Attachments

*	Marketing Collateral

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
